condition_summary: G01 through G11 point-table gates must pass before derivative candidates are published
Derivative scope must include valid file_id and segment_id grouping
Scope point count must satisfy N_points greater than or equal to 7
T_K must be finite and have nontrivial variation in each derivative scope
T_K must be monotonic in scope or explicit policy-split into monotonic subscopes must be declared
No derivative estimate may use points from different segment_id scopes
Provenance must declare whether derivative used M_emu_clean or M_emu_smooth
T spacing nonuniformity statistics and risk class must be reported
Provenance must declare derivative method and window parameters
No interpolation or T regridding unless a separate approved interpolation policy is referenced
dM_dt channel usage must be marked diagnostic-only and not used as transition-shape substitute
segment_type UNKNOWN may be used only for basic diagnostics and not for ZFC FCC FCW interpretation
time_s cannot be assumed elapsed and elapsed interpretations require explicit time_rel_s
pause gaps in time_s do not automatically block dM_dT when T-based gates pass
All transition outputs must be labeled candidate and blocked from Tc or phase-transition claim language
